g.text: Academy Awards nominations for men and

text.tspan: In the 98-year history of the Academy Awards, only four women have ever been nominated for Best Cinematography.
Autumn Durald Arkapaw is the first to win.

svg.text: Oscars For Female Cinematographers Are Rare

text.tspan: first woman to win the award.

svg.text: Each dot represents a nominee in the Best Cinematography category. Earlier years include unofficial nominations that were considered for the award but not announced during the ceremony.
